properties.name: app.jwtSecret
properties.description: Secret used to sign JSON Web Tokens.

properties.name: app.mail.from
properties.description: Sender address for EcoMart transactional email.

properties.name: app.frontend.reset-url
properties.description: Frontend password reset page URL included in email messages.

properties.name: cloudinary.cloud-name
properties.description: Cloudinary cloud name for product image uploads.

properties.name: razorpay.key-id
properties.description: Razorpay key id used by payment order creation.

properties.name: razorpay.key-secret
properties.description: Razorpay key secret used for payment verification.

properties.name: razorpay.currency
properties.description: Currency code used for Razorpay orders.

properties.name: warehouse.name
properties.description: Default warehouse display name for delivery estimates.

properties.name: warehouse.base-delivery-hours
properties.description: Base delivery estimate in hours before travel time.

properties.name: warehouse.average-speed-km-per-hour
properties.description: Average delivery travel speed in kilometers per hour.
